prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall near the quest board, a feminine healer in cream and mint robes with a satchel and an androgynous ranger in a green half-cape with a bow case; the healer presents a sealed quest parcel to the ranger with both hands, visible handoff motion, lively guild background, warm wood textures, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.
